No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with 'technical knowledge' and 'hands-on practical skills' for employment (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: The 'AI Fairness Overview' topic directly addresses developing technology that avoids discrimination, supporting non-discriminatory policies (Target 5.c).

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course fosters technological upgrading and innovation (Target 8.2) by equipping students with advanced AI skills, preparing them for decent jobs (Target 8.5).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core focus on 'Information System Development', 'Explainable and Safe AI', and 'Trustworthy AI' directly enhances scientific research and technological capabilities, driving innovation (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The 'AI Fairness Overview' directly addresses reducing inequalities by eliminating discriminatory practices in algorithms, aligning with Target 10.3.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The 'Social responsibility' core competence and focus on 'ethically adherent' AI promote responsible technology development and sustainable corporate practices (Target 12.6).

Climate Action.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate change or action.

Life Below Water.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course description or objectives links to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's emphasis on 'Trustworthy AI' being 'lawful, ethically adherent, and technically robust' directly supports developing effective, accountable, and transparent institutions (Target 16.6).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course enhances knowledge sharing and capacity building in science and innovation (Target 17.6) through education in enabling technologies like AI (Target 17.8).
